description: Clean title slide with high-contrast dark background — strong first impression
Dense paragraphs of text — violates 'Keep it visual'. Break into bullet points or move to speaker notes
10+ objects on slide — cognitive overload. Trim to ≤6 elements
Full code block with no animation — audience cannot follow. Highlight or reveal lines progressively
Strong supporting diagram — visual anchors the explanation
Body font ~18pt — violates 10-20-30 rule. Increase to ≥30pt
